title: Glutinous Stroop Fritters
description: Crunchy fritters filled with a sweet, sticky stroop core, using glutinous rice flour for added texture.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together glutinous rice flour and sugar.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together egg, stroop, and vanilla extract.
3. Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
4. Heat 1/2 cup of gentle vegetable oil in a large pan over medium heat.
5. Using a spoon, drop small balls of dough into the oil and flatten slightly.
6. Cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
7. Remove fritters from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
